OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Fetches the current Benefit Assignment and related BenefitAssignmentAdjustment records for the Individual Application
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FetchCurrentBenefitAssignments

omniProcessElements.name: FetchIndividualApplicationStatus
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchIndividualApplicationStatus1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "ContextId" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: FetchNewEntitlementAmount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "IndividualApplicationId" : "%GetParentIA:IndividualApplication:ParentApplicationId%", "PrevEntitlementAmount" : "=%BenefitAssignment:EntitlementAmount%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "disableChainable" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "integrationProcedureKey" : "ChangeOfCircumstances_DetermineNewEntitledAmount", "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: GetParentIA
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "individualApplicationId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSGetParentIA1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
